title: Thyagaraja Temple, Tiruvarur
tagline: Thyagaraja Temple, Tiruvarur — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Thyagaraja Temple is a Shiva temple, located in the town of Thiruvarur in Tamil Nadu state, India.
overview.description: Thyagaraja Temple is a Shiva temple, located in the town of Thiruvarur in Tamil Nadu state, India. Shiva is worshiped in the form of a lingam as Thyagarajaswami, also known as Putridankondar. His consort Parvati is worshipped as Goddess Neelotpalambika. She is also worshipped as Goddess Kamalambika, whose separate shrine is an important center for Shaktism and Tantra, and is also regarded to be one of the Shakti Peethas.

topPlaces.name: Thiruvarur
topPlaces.description: Thiruvarur (Tamil: [t̪iɾuʋaːɾuːɾ]) also spelt as Tiruvarur is a town in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is the administrative headquarters of Thiruvarur district and Thiruvarur taluk.

topPlaces.name: Dakshinakokarnesvarar Temple, Pulivalam
topPlaces.description: Dakshinakokarnesvarar Temple, Pulivalam is a Shiva temple in Pulivalam in Tiruvarur district in Tamil Nadu (India).

topPlaces.name: Alivalam
topPlaces.description: Alivalam is a village in the Tiruvarur taluk of Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. Formerly this village was called 'Arivalam'.

topPlaces.name: Adiyakkamangalam
topPlaces.description: Adiyakkamangalam is a village panchayat located in the south Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Located at 5 km from Tiruvarur (East), 15 km from Nagappattinam, it is on the east border of Tiruvarur district.

topPlaces.name: Tirupalli Mukkudal Tirunethranathar Temple
topPlaces.description: Tirupalli Mukkudal Tirunethranathar Temple (Tamil: திருப்பள்ளி முக்கூடல் திருநேத்திரநாதர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Tirupalli Mukkudal in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The historical name of the place is Kekkarai.

topPlaces.name: Devarkandanallur
topPlaces.description: Devarkandanallur is a village in the Thiruvarur taluk of Tiruvarur district in Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Agarathirunallur
topPlaces.description: Agarathirunallur is a village in the Kudavasal taluk of Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Veerateeswarar Temple, Thiruvirkudi
topPlaces.description: Veerateeswarar Temple (also called Thiruvirkudi Veerateeswarar temple) is a Hindu temple located at Thiruvirkudi in Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva in the form of Veerateswarar and his consort is known as Elavar Kuzhali.

Agarathirunallur is a village in the Kudavasal taluk of Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Thyagaraja Temple, Tiruvarur?
faq.a: The best time to visit Thyagaraja Temple, Tiruvarur is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Thyagaraja Temple, Tiruvarur?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (103 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (105 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Thyagaraja Temple, Tiruvarur?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Thyagaraja Temple, Tiruvarur at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Thyagaraja Temple, Tiruvarur?
faq.a: Stays in Thyagaraja Temple, Tiruvarur start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Thyagaraja Temple, Tiruvarur?
faq.a: The top attractions are Thiruvarur, Dakshinakokarnesvarar Temple, Pulivalam, Alivalam, Adiyakkamangalam, Tirupalli Mukkudal Tirunethranathar Temple.
